summary: Forward Deployed Engineer with 5+ years shipping agentic AI platforms and full-stack products at scale. Experienced designing and deploying autonomous agent systems, LLM integrations, and production infrastructure for enterprise customers. Proven track record building self-evolving code systems, MCP-native agent middleware, and data-driven platforms that power 50,000+ users, with deep expertise in agentic architecture, rapid experimentation, and production-grade AI systems.

bullet_overrides.24h-evolving-code: Designed and shipped a self-evolving agentic code system (generator/evaluator loop) that accelerated development velocity; implemented CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions to close iteration cycles in under 24 hours.
bullet_overrides.mdt-platform: Led end-to-end product development and launched a production platform that increased doctor-patient engagement by 30%; built and deployed chatbot agents in collaboration with stakeholders to automate patient workflows.

skill_emphasis: AWS (EC2, SES, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs)
